command: curl -s 'https://api.github.com/repos/motitap-dotcom/MT5-PropFirm-Bot/actions/runs?per_page=5' | python3 -c 'import sys,json; runs=json.load(sys.stdin).get("workflow_runs",[]); [print(f"#{r["run_number"]} {r["status"]}/{r.get("conclusion","pending")} {r["name"]} [{r["head_branch"]}] {r["created_at"]}") for r in runs]' 2>&1; echo '---'; RUNID=$(curl -s 'https://api.github.com/repos/motitap-dotcom/MT5-PropFirm-Bot/actions/runs?per_page=1' | python3 -c 'import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin)["workflow_runs"][0]["id"])' 2>&1); echo "Latest run ID: $RUNID"; curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/motitap-dotcom/MT5-PropFirm-Bot/actions/runs/$RUNID/jobs" | python3 -c 'import sys,json; jobs=json.load(sys.stdin).get("jobs",[]); [print(f"Job: {j["name"]} - {j["status"]}/{j.get("conclusion","?")}\n" + "\n".join(f"  [{s.get("conclusion",s["status"])}] {s["name"]}" for s in j.get("steps",[]))) for j in jobs]' 2>&1
